mapper.insert: INSERT INTO direct_message (conversation_id, sender_id, content, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, false, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.profile_image as sender_profile_image FROM direct_message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.profile_image as sender_profile_image FROM direct_message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.*, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.profile_image as sender_profile_image FROM direct_message m LEFT JOIN user u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND m.is_deleted = false ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM direct_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND is_deleted = false
